title: ED Market Data Strategy
description:
Executive Director – Regional Head of Market Data & Digital Strategy (APAC)

Compensation: c420-470K SGD + bonus
Confidential Search

A global financial institution is seeking a senior leader to own APAC Market Data strategy, spanning commercial management, digital transformation, and AI enablement. Reporting to the Global Head of Market Data, this role carries regional authority with global visibility.

The Role
You will lead the end-to-end market data agenda across APAC, advising senior business leaders on cost optimisation, data governance, and next-generation data consumption models. The mandate covers vendor strategy, regulatory alignment, and transformation toward cloud and AI-ready platforms.

Key Focus Areas

  • Own APAC negotiations and strategy with Tier-1 data providers such as Bloomberg, MSCI and LSEG

  • Drive migration to modern, cloud-native and hybrid data platforms

  • Define and execute an AI-ready data roadmap for analytics and quantitative teams

  • Automate vendor onboarding, entitlement management, and cost attribution

  • Ensure regulatory and contractual compliance across Singapore and Hong Kong

  • Manage a substantial regional market data budget with strong commercial discipline

Candidate Profile

  • 20+ years in Market Data, Vendor Management, or Data Strategy within a major financial institution or fintech

  • Proven leader in complex, high-value global data negotiations

  • Strong understanding of cloud data platforms, APIs, and enterprise AI usage

  • Track record delivering operational and digital transformation

  • Confident operating with senior regional and global stakeholders

  • Deep familiarity with APAC financial markets

Why Consider This Role

  • Senior regional mandate with strategic influence

  • Ownership of a multi-year digital and AI transformation

  • Executive-level compensation and visibility

This is a confidential search. Further details shared at shortlist stage only.

postedCompany.description:
Aryan Solutions was formed in 2008 in Singapore.


Aryan Solutions is an ISO 9001:2015 (QM), ISO 27001:2013 (IEC) and IEC 15504 (SPICE) Certified IT Consulting, Outsourcing & Staffing Company that specializes in providing IT Consulting, Technology Services, Staffing, Managed Services, Search to Local and Multi-national Companies within APAC, SEA, India & Australia who are leaders in Financial Services, Hedge funds, Asset Management, Telecommunication, Information Technology, Manufacturing, and Government & Public Sector.


Aryan Solutions is headquartered in Singapore with offices in KL (Malaysia), Lucknow (India).


We have a team of highly experienced Consultants working across the Region covering Singapore, USA, UK Malaysia, India, Indonesia, Hong Kong & Australia.


Our offshore development center in India is ISO 9001:2015 (QM) Certified and is a 200 seater plug-and-play office.
postedCompany.name: ARYAN SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
